page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Modeling the residue interaction network of the Respiratory Chain subunits.

MitImpact is a collection of pre-computed pathogenicity predictions for all possible nucleotide changes that cause non-synonymous substitutions in human mitochondrial protein coding genes.
